test_cases.input_summary: Local government vote: city council approves 12.6km cycling lane network 7-4, £2.1m active travel grant, two attributed quotes, 350 words, regional newspaper

Public safety: gas leak forces evacuation of 34 residents, one hospitalised as precaution, leak sealed within 4 hours, 300 words, local news
